Dongguan purchasing level (official website synchronized ✈️ airplane box packaging)  
Hermès 25SS Spring/Summer new Mary Jane shoes have become a huge hit in recent years.  
Featuring a subtle contrasting color with the shoe body, the design is simple yet exudes a high-end vintage and artistic vibe.  
Upper: Original imported calf leather (not the common lambskin found in the market), extremely delicate and soft to the touch.  
Lining: Full mixed breed sheepskin, incredibly comfortable to wear.  
Sole: Genuine Italian leather sole!  
Simple shoes with premium materials, delivering a full sense of quality upon arrival!  
Size: #35-41 (sizes 40 and 41 are custom-made and non-returnable)  
Comes with original box and full packaging!

Top-tier Hermes 24 / Classic runway long boots from Hermès, undoubtedly a luxury icon. Each piece is deeply memorable. Though styles are limited, they excel in quality and timelessness, never going out of fashion. A brand known for value retention and appreciation—rare in consumer goods.

This shoe features the brand’s signature metal buckle, a classic refined by history. Limited stock from official channels. The leather is exceptionally soft, like baby skin, offering a luxurious feel. High material consumption. Heel height: 8cm.

✔️ Material: Imported cowhide upper  
✔️ Lining: Imported cowhide  
✔️ Sole: Italian double-layer genuine leather  
✔️ Sizes: 35-41 (40 and 41 are custom-made)
